vehicle_information.immobiliser_system: Instrument-cluster based Immo2/Immo3 family depending on build and cluster
vehicle_information.transponder_type: ID48 crypto family on most later UK vehicles; verify early build
vehicle_information.key_type: Remote flip key or non-remote transponder key

access_method.add_key: OBD adaptation when security data is available

adapter: EEPROM programmer only when data extraction is required

programming.all_keys_lost: Read required security data then adapt keys
programming.route: Identify Immo2 or Immo3 before programming

vehicle_information.notes: Do not combine Immo2 and Immo3 procedures. Confirm cluster and transponder before preparing the key.

programming.route: Identify cluster manufacturer before selecting method

vehicle_information.notes: VDO, Micronas and other cluster variants must not be treated as one procedure.

vehicle_information.immobiliser_system: Later cluster-based Volkswagen immobiliser; exact family depends on fitted dashboard

access_method.all_keys_lost: Cluster data route may be required

programming.add_key: Diagnostic or saved-data route depending on dashboard
programming.route: Do not select by year alone

vehicle_information.notes: Keep Immo4 Challenge and trade-labelled Immo4.5 classifications separate until the dashboard is identified.

vehicle.variant: Keyed or KESSY depending on specification

vehicle_information.module_type: Instrument cluster / access-start system on KESSY variants
vehicle_information.blade_profile: HU66 or HU162T family depending on key and build — verify physically
vehicle_information.key_type: Remote key or KESSY smart key

access_method.all_keys_lost: Dashboard data or bench route may be required

adapter: Dashboard adapter or programmer when required

programming.add_key: OBD or saved-data route depending on dashboard and tool
programming.route: Separate keyed and KESSY variants during the job

vehicle_information.notes: Dashboard family and keyless specification determine the actual procedure.

vehicle.variant: Keyed or KESSY depending on specification

vehicle_information.immobiliser_system: Later MQB ID48 family with dashboard-dependent access
vehicle_information.module_type: Instrument cluster / access-start system on KESSY variants
vehicle_information.blade_profile: HU162T family on many later keys — verify track and tip
vehicle_information.key_type: Remote key or KESSY smart key

access_method.all_keys_lost: Dashboard data or supported bench route

adapter: Dashboard adapter or programmer when required

programming.all_keys_lost: Confirm current dashboard support before accepting work

vehicle_information.notes: Do not assume Mk7 and Mk7.5 use identical dashboard access.

vehicle.variant: Keyed or keyless depending on specification

vehicle_information.module_type: Instrument cluster / access-start system depending on specification
vehicle_information.transponder_type: Later MQB key family — confirm by VIN and original key

access_method.all_keys_lost: Confirm current aftermarket coverage before accepting

adapter: Current platform-specific security access or adapter when required
